cells.text: Valuation of investments in and loans to affiliated companies

The financial statements of CA Immobilien Anlagen Aktiengesellschaft as of December 31, 2024 show material investments in affiliated companies (TEUR 3.111.698) as well as material loans to affiliated companies (TEUR 38.576). Furthermore, the financial statements show impairments of investments in affiliated companies of TEUR 31.821 and reversal of impairments of TEUR 14.430.
